Desert Rune
Augment
Stack Size: 1 / 10
Requires: Level 15
Martial Weapon: Adds 7 to 11 Fire Damage
Wand or Staff: Gain 8% of Damage as Extra Fire Damage
Armour: +12% to Fire Resistance
Bonded:
Martial Weapon: 25% increased Ignite Magnitude
Wand or Staff: 25% increased Ignite Magnitude
Armour: +10 to maximum Life, +10 to maximum Mana
Place into an empty Augment Socket in a Weapon or Armour to apply its effect to that item. Once socketed it cannot be retrieved but can be replaced by other Augment items. Shift click to unstack.
Forge Recipe /2
Used in Three to One Reforge Crafting Bench Craft.
